summary: The release anchor cites existing source and source-snapshot records that match the D+Q postmenopausal bone RCT registry and PubMed-indexed article metadata. This review accepts those records as release dependencies while keeping article full-text retention outside the anchor scope.

findings.claim_or_issue: The ClinicalTrials.gov source and API v2 snapshot are present and source-linked for NCT04313634.
findings.why_it_matters: Registry-extracted outcomes and results need a reproducible public source and snapshot dependency before they can enter accepted-record exports.
findings.recommended_action: Use the registry source and snapshot as the retained provenance base for this release boundary.

findings.claim_or_issue: The PubMed source and EFetch snapshot are acceptable as metadata and abstract provenance, not as retained publisher full text.
findings.why_it_matters: The release boundary must distinguish article metadata access from reusable article full-text access.
findings.recommended_action: Keep full-text extraction work behind a separate rights-classified text snapshot.
